title: Metric
description: Metadata for a single available fundamental metric including its category, data type, and documentation reference.

metric.description: Metric identifier to be used as input in the metrics parameter.

name.description: Plain text name of the metric.

category.description: Primary category such as INCOME_STATEMENT, BALANCE_SHEET, CASH_FLOW, or RATIOS.

subcategory.description: Sub-category such as ASSETS, SUPPLEMENTAL, SHAREHOLDERS_EQUITY, VALUATION, PROFITABILITY, etc.

oaPageId.description: Online Assistant Page ID in D***** format for methodology lookup.

oaUrl.description: Online Assistant URL for methodology definitions.

factor.description: The factor for the metric (e.g. 1000000 = millions).

sdfPackage.description: Standard Data Feed package availability. BASIC or ADVANCED. Null indicates API-only availability.

dataType.description: The data type for the metric (date, doubleArray, float, floatArray, intArray, string, stringArray).
